---
title: 'Day out with Thomas'
date: '2012-02-08T22:52:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8204136561679055453'
blogger_filename: '/2012/02/day-out-with-thomas.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Discover'
---

<span style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">Looking for a place to take the kids? Thomas the Train visits&nbsp;</span><a data-mce-href="https://www.grapevinetexasusa.com/ThingsToDo/GrapevineVintageRailroad/tabid/267/Default.aspx" href="https://www.grapevinetexasusa.com/ThingsToDo/GrapevineVintageRailroad/tabid/267/Default.aspx" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;" target="_blank">Grapevine Vintage Railroad</a><span style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">&nbsp;in the "</span><a data-mce-href="http://events.hitentertainment.com/us/day-out-with-thomas/index.asp" href="http://events.hitentertainment.com/us/day-out-with-thomas/index.asp" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;" target="_blank">Day out with Thomas</a><span style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">" A real life sized version of Thomas is loaded on the back of a train and it pulls up to on the train tracks. There are a series of events at the train park, including appearances by a large outfitted&nbsp;</span><a data-mce-href="http://ttte.wikia.com/wiki/Sir_Topham_Hatt" href="http://ttte.wikia.com/wiki/Sir_Topham_Hatt" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;" target="_blank">Mr. Topham Hatt</a><span style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">. There are tickets required for the event so it's not an inexpensive day out. But if your little ones are Thomas Fans, this could be something worth making a day of.&nbsp;</span>
